change_description: Assessment-driven revisions: (1) Added Semantic Scholar as 7th source, removed AIS eLibrary; (2) Added Cohen's κ inter-rater reliability metric with κ≥0.70 threshold; (3) Justified two-block search design; (4) Added explicit grey literature policy; (5) Added English-only language restriction; (6) Extended extraction codebook with 20 Hoefler-framework fields for Stage B; (7) Added GRADE-adapted certainty-of-evidence assessment; (8) Added pilot screening documentation plan and calibration log template
author: TVW
